programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: When Kate unexpectedly sees Homer Bedloe in Hooterville she knows trouble is in store Because of the continual problems he has faced trying to scrap the Cannonball Bedloe states he has given up on that idea Instead he plans on selling the Cannonball - a seemingly one-of-a-kind antique locomotive - and he has a buyer on hand

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Widow Ellen Garner is followed by her husband Mickeys ghost who tries to fix her up Divorced Les and Gail see their daughter and her husband off but get locked in an unused cabin Gophers sister Jennifer makes a beeline for Doc

programme.desc: Daktari 305

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The old woman who runs the newsstand in Jonathans building is being blackmailed for a murder she may not have committed

programme.title: Addams Family 130

programme.title: Addams Family 107
programme.desc: Addams Family 107

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The gold-digging landowner of a Caribbean villa attempts to woo a haughty rich young woman with the aid of a potion made by his ex-lover; a voodoo priestess But trouble ensues when he ignores the warnings about the potion

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lew Bridgeman and Joe Caldwell are two longtime best friends who served together in the Vietnam War Lew and Joe wind clashing with each other over Lews fetching wife Rae whom both men are in love with

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: In a run down hotel in a town where a slasher has killed 7 people Eric checks in after inquiring about Skorzeny He meets several people staying at the hotel including a man in black who reveals that he is also werewolf born in 1468

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric teams up with an elderly homeless man who is also a werewolf in an effort to defeat Remy But discovers that the Gray Wolf hungers for human flesh

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: An actress complicates an investigation when she tries to play detective in a real life case

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan are transported to 1875 London where aided by an adventurous young writer they set out to reclaim a cursed object from a bloodthirsty killer

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa injures his arm he sorely regrets that he stubbornly and secretly refused to join the rest of the family in taking out a group health insurance policy offered by the Grange

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: At an island paradise hotel 86 and Harry Hoo solve a murder mystery

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 end up on a KAOS sub commanded by Siegfried

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When Bear becomes ill BJ takes him to a vet and is subsequently told that he has died However it turns out that the vet is secretly selling animals to a laboratory and Bear is still alive

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Nearby war games inspire Hogan to replace some of the blank German ammunition with live ammo using Klinks birthday as a diversion

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan nixes a mission to destroy a synthetic fuel plant because the caper is too riskybut he is overruled - and forced to participate in the scheme by the ploys mastermind a strong-willed determined female scientist

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys try to make some money with some phony pearl oysters but their scheme backfires when a greedy Binghamton takes over their operation Then when Chief Urulu muscles in on Binghamtons business McHale and The Crew put a stop to the whole operation by taking advantage of an old native superstition and some Japanese technology

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Major complications develop when the guys send a chapter of Parkers war novel - Including a highly fictionalized account of his sinking of the biggest battleship in the Japanese fleet - To Parkers hometown girlfriend in an attempt to help him win her heart

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke talks Gomer into taking a jeep to the airport

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways are scared that a group of gangsters are on the island but it turns out just to be a parrot who also squawks wildly when he hears the words boat and jewel

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is forced to become the Howells house-boy when the Skipper loses a bet to Mr Howell in a turtle actually a tortoise race

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw has invented a spray that rots wood instantly If he is not paid one million dollars he will destroy every forest in the world Inspector gadget destroys the invention

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw plans to use a flock of trained birds to steal a precious jewel

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Gophers friend Phil offers him a job managing his hotel Magician Kens assistant Maggie is upset when he sends his brother Al to replace him in the act Hetty moves into a ships cabin to get closer to porter Charlie

programme.title: WKRP 114
programme.desc: WKRP 114

programme.title: WKRP 111
programme.desc: WKRP 111

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman must find another job when hes laid off due to budget cuts

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood receives a telegraph to say his cousin Readith who bullied him as a child is returning to Evebing Shade

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Mike Logan hires Dan to find his daughter Jennys rapist Bella discovers that the serial rapist targets slender blondes in their late teens When the rapist kills a victim Jenny becomes a witness and Bea becomes a decoy

programme.title: Hercules 223
programme.desc: Hercules 223

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project but the others are worried about his involvement When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet the Earth is in danger

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dr Russells presumed-dead husband mysteriously reappears on a reconnaissance mission to a nearby planet

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl knows her stepfather murdered her mother But her attempts to unmask him only impede the polices investigation

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A pretty airline stewardess badly injures Kimble in a traffic accident and in his delirium he admits who he is and she helps him In turn Kimble helps her realize the married man shes dating is not right for her

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As the powerful Barkley family and surrounding Valley community face the prospect of losing their land to a ruthless railroad baron a mysterious stranger arrives with life-changing news for the family

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A school teacher claims to have killed a bank robber The townspeople want to celebrate their new hero It all starts to unravel as his past catches up with him and the people hes lived with want nothing else to do with him

programme.desc: Young 303

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Brett Caswell v. Mark Handley

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Stephan Puetz v. Rashid Yusupov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jerad Meyer v. Zach Snyder.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Sam Franchi moved from Venezuela to Canada when he was 14 years old. His initial introduction to martial arts came first through Jiu Jitsu. He eventually made a complete transition to MMA. He is the Hard Knocks Flyweight Champion in the amateur division and hopes to keep a clean record while working his way professional division.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Anis Dada v. Scott Turner

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Miles Anstead is set to battle in the cage at HK51 against Adrian Miles. See what life is like for him as he gets ready for the fight on October 14...time to choose your side!

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss invents a thermal ray which dangerously overheats the Prides engines forcing the Lightning League to land on Sandeen in search of amethysts a cooling gem which can protect the engines This is Saw Boss plan A prisoner Antar escapes

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss is capturing all the scientists of a Brain Trust by luring them with a false message from Audric to his radiation surrounded base Jayce stumbles upon the plan and smuggles himself Flora Gillian Oon and the vehicles onto the base

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM kidnaps panda bears from China and transports them Easter Island Its up to MASK figure out how to rescue the bears who have been put in harms way

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM terrorizes Tokyo Japan using a new vehicle called Blackout which is capable of draining electrical power supplies

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: The N team gets warp into the world of Faxanadu after a power overload in the Palace of Powers football arena There they get mixed in the conflict between elves and dwarves and also an evil being bent on getting a powerful crystal that will let him conquer the video world

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While Link and Zelda are at Lanas royal ball the furious Mother Brain fires Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo for failing to capture the Triforce So Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo steal the Triforce pieces for themselves

programme.title: Dugeons Dragons
programme.desc: A terrifying creature called The Darkling has been kidnapping people for a thousand years A few more victims will give him the power to take over the entire Realm The team must stop The Darkling but he is too much for them

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain try to derail MADs plan to steal an entire train carrying sophisticated computers that will help their operation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to infiltrate MADs laboratory that is producing a sleeping gas so powerful that it will send everyone in the world to fall asleep
